quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Cf:
A scatter plot.

For more information, see [Using scatter plots](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/scatter-plot.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Ac.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Ch.Description: The configuration settings of the visual.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Co.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Su.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Ti.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.analysis.scatterplotvisual.Vi.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
